unlock_body:
The sytem may wont't recieve updates in the unlocked state.
The deployment state cant be managed cleanly by OSTree.
usroverlay_body:
rpm-ostree usroverlay creates a temporary writable overlay on /usr.
It reverts automatically on reboot and does not affect updates.
Proceed with caution.
alternatives: Use one of these alternatives instead:
opt_usroverlay: rpm-ostree usroverlay - temporary /usr overlay, reverts on reboot
opt_distrobox: distrobox - run any Linux distro as a container
opt_pkglayer: pkglayer - apt/yay/dnf/nix/emerge package manager that feel native via Distrobox
opt_brew: brew (Homebrew) - Install CLI packages very easily and stable.
terminal_warning:
Don't blindly run terminal commands from online guides!
They can permanently damage your system.
